name: work-loop
description: Marketplace for the work-loop plugin and its cross-model verifier dependency.

plugins.name: work-loop
plugins.description: An iterative development loop — build and review one unit at a time (per-unit audit + /simplify), with chunk- and turn-level gates adding cross-model Codex and a /code-review pass.

plugins.name: skill-codex
plugins.description: Delegate prompts to OpenAI Codex CLI — work-loop's cross-model verifier. Sha-pinned; upstream: skills-directory/skill-codex.
